questionHtml: Hence describe the correlation between temperature difference from 37 °C and heartbeat.
markschemeHtml:
(moderately) strong, positive       (A1)(ft)(A1)(ft)

Note: Award (A1) for (moderately) strong, (A1) for positive. Follow through from part (d)(i). If there is no answer to part (d)(i), award at most (A0)(A1).

[2 marks]

meta.title: Hence describe the correlation between temperature difference from 37 °C and heartbeat.
